name: Polomar Health Services, Inc.
business: Polomar Health Services, Inc. operates Polomar Specialty Pharmacy, a Florida licensed retail compounding pharmacy that dispenses injectable and other sterile compounds upon prescription. The company focuses on compounded GLP-1 agonist weight loss drugs, erectile dysfunction formulations, and dermatological medications, and plans to launch a weight loss tele-health platform called SlimRx.
sellsTo: individual patients via online tele-health platforms

exposures.sentence: The Company has executed a contract with ForHumanity Health, Inc. for our licensed inhalable sildenafil drug and with CareValidate for sterile GLP-1 agonist weight loss drugs.

The Company also owns SlimRx (www.slimrx.com), a weight loss focused online platform that the Company plans to launch in the second quarter of 2026, that will connect patients with licensed healthcare providers to prescribe weight loss medications such as semaglutide and tirzepatide compounded with vitamin B-12 and other complementary compounded weight loss formulations (VitaSlim and VitaSlim Plus ), including adjunctive therapies utilizing our proprietary metformin gummy formulation.
We believe our pre-filled injection pen system will provide an easier, better, and more comfortable user experience thereby providing us a potential marketing advantage.

catalysts.event: Execution of pharmacy services agreement with CareValidate to fulfill GLP-1 agonist prescriptions
catalysts.sentence: On September 26, 2025, the Company executed a one-year non-exclusive pharmacy services agreement with CareValidate, Inc. (CareValidate) to fulfill GLP-1 agonist prescriptions for CareValidate’s network of on-line clinics.

catalysts.event: Expected provision of prescription medications in additional U.S. states
catalysts.sentence: Polomar Pharmacy is actively seeking licenses and authorization in other states and expects to be able to provide prescription medications in additional U.S. states by the end of the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Planned launch of SlimRx weight loss platform
catalysts.sentence: The Company also owns SlimRx (www.slimrx.com), a weight loss focused online platform that the Company plans to launch in the second quarter of 2026, that will connect patients with licensed healthcare providers to prescribe weight loss medications such as semaglutide and tirzepatide compounded with vitamin B-12 and other complementary compounded weight loss formulations (VitaSlim and VitaSlim Plus ), including adjunctive therapies utilizing our proprietary metformin gummy formulation.
